title: Rainbase Pulls the Trap Tight
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on rainbase pulls the trap tight, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Rainbase Pulls the Trap Tight. The Straw Hats reach Rainbase while Marines, Baroque Works, and Crocodile’s casino pull every side into the same trap. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: The sun sets and rises again.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Time remain- ing before Operation Utopia:

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Alrinlight! Time to Kick Crocodile's Ass!

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Are you done with that thing I asked for?

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Here! This is your new weapon!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Right. It might not look like it, but your staff's been completely overhauled!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Its attacks change depending on how you assemble the individual parts!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hey, don't give anything too dangerous to Nami now.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: If Nami and Vivi don't want to fight, then they don't need to...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Because I'll protect them at all times!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: By the way, does Baroque Works know we're currently in the country?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Not only did we run across Mr. 2, but Mr. 3's also somewhere in the country,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So I can't imagine Baroque Works would still be in the dark.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Well if they know our faces, we can't take any overt actions.

summary: This part develops rainbase pulls the trap tight and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
